title: lansium parasiticum
intro: Lansium parasiticum, also known as the langsat or longkong, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. The fruit of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and wounds. The health benefits of Lansium parasiticum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Lansium parasiticum can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as tea, juice, and powder, and is often consumed fresh or dried for its nutritional and medicinal benefits.
